##  Mean   :0.9511   Mean   :0.08418   Mean   :2.511   Mean   : 3.185  
##  3rd Qu.:1.0000   3rd Qu.:0.00000   3rd Qu.:3.000   3rd Qu.: 2.000

##  Median : 0.000   Median :0.0000   Median :0.0000   Median : 8.000

##  3rd Qu.: 3.000   3rd Qu.:0.0000   3rd Qu.:1.0000   3rd Qu.:10.000

##    Education        Income

df %>%
  count(Diabetes_012) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n))
##   Diabetes_012      n       prop
## 1            0 213703 0.84241170
## 2            1   4631 0.01825528
## 3            2  35346 0.13933302
df %>%
  mutate(Diabetes_012 = factor(Diabetes_012,
    levels = c(0,1,2),
    labels = c("No diabetes", "Prediabetes", "Diabetes"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(Diabetes_012)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(
    x = "Diabetes status",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Distribution of diabetes status (count)"
  )

df$AgeGroup <- factor(
  df$Age,
  levels = 1:13,
  labels = c(
    "18–24","25–29","30–34","35–39","40–44","45–49",
    "50–54","55–59","60–64","65–69","70–74","75–79","80+"
  ),
  ordered = TRUE
)

table(df$AgeGroup)
## 
## 18–24 25–29 30–34 35–39 40–44 45–49 50–54 55–59 60–64 65–69 70–74 75–79   80+ 
##  5700  7598 11123 13823 16157 19819 26314 30832 33244 32194 23533 15980 17363
ggplot(df, aes(AgeGroup)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(
    x = "Age group",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Distribution of age groups"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(df, aes(AgeGroup, fill = factor(Diabetes_012))) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(
    x = "Age group",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Diabetes status",
    title = "Diabetes status by age group"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

plot_density(df %>% select(BMI))

df %>%
  mutate(Diabetes_012 = factor(Diabetes_012,
    levels = c(0,1,2),
    labels = c("No diabetes", "Prediabetes", "Diabetes"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = BMI, fill = Diabetes_012)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4) +
  labs(
    title = "BMI distribution by diabetes status",
    x = "BMI",
    y = "Density",
    fill = "Diabetes status"
  )

df %>%
  mutate(Diabetes_012 = factor(Diabetes_012,
    levels = c(0,1,2),
    labels = c("No diabetes", "Prediabetes", "Diabetes"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Diabetes_012, y = BMI)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "BMI by diabetes status",
    x = "Diabetes status",
    y = "BMI"
  )

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Diabetes_012 = factor(Diabetes_012,
      levels = c(0,1,2),
      labels = c("No diabetes", "Prediabetes", "Diabetes")),
    HighBP   = factor(HighBP,   levels = c(0,1), labels = c("No","Yes")),
    HighChol = factor(HighChol, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("No","Yes")),
    Smoker = factor(Smoker, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("No","Yes"))
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = Diabetes_012, fill = HighBP)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(
    title = "High blood pressure by diabetes status",
    x = "Diabetes status",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "High BP"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = Diabetes_012, fill = HighChol)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(
    title = "High cholesterol by diabetes status",
    x = "Diabetes status",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "High Chol"
  )

ggplot(df, aes(x = Diabetes_012, fill = Smoker)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(
    title = "Smoking status by diabetes status",
    x = "Diabetes status",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Smoker"
  )

library(boot)
## 
## Attaching package: 'boot'
## The following object is masked from 'package:survival':
## 
##     aml
boot_mean <- function(data, indices) {
  mean(data[indices])
}

set.seed(123)

# lọc sạch BMI theo nhóm
bmi_no   <- df$BMI[df$Diabetes_012 == "No diabetes"]
bmi_pre   <- df$BMI[df$Diabetes_012 == "Prediabetes"]
bmi_diab <- df$BMI[df$Diabetes_012 == "Diabetes"]

bmi_no   <- bmi_no[is.finite(bmi_no)]
bmi_pre   <- bmi_pre[is.finite(bmi_pre)]
bmi_diab <- bmi_diab[is.finite(bmi_diab)]

# bootstrap
boot_no   <- boot(bmi_no,   statistic = boot_mean, R = 1000)
boot_pre   <- boot(bmi_pre,   statistic = boot_mean, R = 1000)
boot_diab <- boot(bmi_diab, statistic = boot_mean, R = 1000)

# CI kiểu percentile
boot.ci(boot_no,   type = "perc")
## BOOTSTRAP CONFIDENCE INTERVAL CALCULATIONS
## Based on 1000 bootstrap replicates
## 
## CALL : 
## boot.ci(boot.out = boot_no, type = "perc")
## 
## Intervals : 
## Level     Percentile     
## 95%   (27.72, 27.77 )  
## Calculations and Intervals on Original Scale
boot.ci(boot_pre,   type = "perc")
## BOOTSTRAP CONFIDENCE INTERVAL CALCULATIONS
## Based on 1000 bootstrap replicates
## 
## CALL : 
## boot.ci(boot.out = boot_pre, type = "perc")
## 
## Intervals : 
## Level     Percentile     
## 95%   (30.53, 30.93 )  
## Calculations and Intervals on Original Scale
boot.ci(boot_diab, type = "perc")
## BOOTSTRAP CONFIDENCE INTERVAL CALCULATIONS
## Based on 1000 bootstrap replicates
## 
## CALL : 
## boot.ci(boot.out = boot_diab, type = "perc")
## 
## Intervals : 
## Level     Percentile     
## 95%   (31.87, 32.03 )  
## Calculations and Intervals on Original Scale

PHẦN CỦA THU HỒNG Thống kê mô tả theo nhóm

df %>%
  group_by(Diabetes_012) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_BMI = mean(BMI, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_BMI = sd(BMI, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
## # A tibble: 3 × 4
##   Diabetes_012      n mean_BMI sd_BMI
##   <fct>         <int>    <dbl>  <dbl>
## 1 No diabetes  213703     27.7   6.26
## 2 Prediabetes    4631     30.7   6.96
## 3 Diabetes      35346     31.9   7.36

One-way ANOVA cổ điển

anova_classic <- aov(BMI ~ Diabetes_012, data = df)
summary(anova_classic)
##                  Df   Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)    
## Diabetes_012      2   561268  280634    6768 <2e-16 ***
## Residuals    253677 10518121      41                   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1

Permutation ANOVA

set.seed(123)
anova_perm <- oneway_test(
BMI ~ Diabetes_012,
data = df,
distribution = approximate(nresample = 5000)
)
anova_perm
## 
##  Approximative K-Sample Fisher-Pitman Permutation Test
## 
## data:  BMI by
##   Diabetes_012 (No diabetes, Prediabetes, Diabetes)
## chi-squared = 12851, p-value < 2e-04

ost-hoc pairwise comparison (Permutation t-test + hiệu chỉnh Holm)

pairwise_results <- df %>%
pairwise_t_test(
BMI ~ Diabetes_012,
p.adjust.method = "holm"
)
pairwise_results
## # A tibble: 3 × 9
##   .y.   group1     group2     n1    n2         p p.signif     p.adj p.adj.signif
## * <chr> <chr>      <chr>   <int> <int>     <dbl> <chr>        <dbl> <chr>       
## 1 BMI   No diabet… Predi… 213703  4631 5.31e-213 ****     1.06e-212 ****        
## 2 BMI   No diabet… Diabe… 213703 35346 0         ****     0         ****        
## 3 BMI   Prediabet… Diabe…   4631 35346 8.55e- 34 ****     8.55e- 34 ****
# Biểu đồ Violin + Boxplot + Mean
ggplot(df, aes(x = Diabetes_012, y = BMI, fill = Diabetes_012)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.6) +            # Biểu đồ violin
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.7, outlier.alpha = 0.2) +  # Boxplot bên trong
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 23, size = 3, fill = "white") +  # Mean
  labs(
    title = "BMI Distribution Across Diabetes Status Groups",
    x = "Diabetes Status",
    y = "BMI"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

set.seed(123)
n_perm <- 10000

perm_results <- replicate(n_perm, {
  perm_group <- sample(df$Diabetes_012)  
  mean(df$BMI[perm_group == "Diabetes"], na.rm = TRUE)
})

mean_obs <- mean(df$BMI[df$Diabetes_012 == "Diabetes"], na.rm = TRUE)
ggplot(data = data.frame(value = perm_results), aes(x = value)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 15, fill = "gray80", color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mean_obs, color = "blue", linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Mean BMI nhóm Diabetes",
    y = "Tần số",
    title = "Phân phối trung bình BMI theo permutation"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

PHẦN CỦA HOÀNG BẢO

# ===================================================================
#  PHÂN TÍCH MỐI LIÊN HỆ & KIỂM ĐỊNH
# ===================================================================

library(boot)

# Permutation Test cho BMI giữa các nhóm Diabetes
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Viết hàm permutation test 

perm_test_two_groups <- function(.data, var, group, group1, group2, R = 10000) {
  # Lọc dữ liệu cho 2 nhóm
  data_filtered <- .data %>%
    filter({{group}} %in% c(group1, group2)) %>%
    select({{var}}, {{group}}) %>%
    filter(is.finite({{var}}))
  
  # Tính thống kê từ dữ liệu gốc
  group_means <- data_filtered %>%
    group_by({{group}}) %>%
    summarise(mean_val = mean({{var}}), n = n(), .groups = "drop")
  
  mean_1 <- group_means$mean_val[group_means[[1]] == group1]
  mean_2 <- group_means$mean_val[group_means[[1]] == group2]
  obs_diff <- mean_1 - mean_2
  
  # Chuẩn bị dữ liệu cho permutation
  values <- pull(data_filtered, {{var}})
  groups <- pull(data_filtered, {{group}})
  n <- length(values)
  n_group1 <- sum(groups == group1)
  
  # Permutation
  set.seed(21)
  perm_diffs <- sapply(1:R, function(i) {
    idx_1 <- sample(1:n, size = n_group1, replace = FALSE)
    idx_2 <- setdiff(1:n, idx_1)
    mean_perm_1 <- mean(values[idx_1])
    mean_perm_2 <- mean(values[idx_2])
    return(mean_perm_1 - mean_perm_2)
  })
  
  # Tính p-value (hai phía)
  p_val <- mean(abs(perm_diffs) >= abs(obs_diff))
  
  return(list(
    obs_diff = obs_diff,
    perm_diffs = perm_diffs,
    p_value = p_val,
    group1 = group1,
    group2 = group2
  ))
}

# Áp dụng permutation test cho BMI
cat("\n=== PERMUTATION TEST: BMI ===\n")
## 
## === PERMUTATION TEST: BMI ===
# So sánh Diabetes vs No diabetes
cat("\n--- Diabetes vs No diabetes ---\n")
## 
## --- Diabetes vs No diabetes ---
perm_bmi_1 <- perm_test_two_groups(df, BMI, Diabetes_012, 
                                    "Diabetes", "No diabetes", R = 10000)
cat("Chênh lệch trung bình quan sát:", round(perm_bmi_1$obs_diff, 2), "\n")
## Chênh lệch trung bình quan sát: 4.2
cat("P-value:", perm_bmi_1$p_value, "\n")
## P-value: 0
# So sánh Prediabetes vs No diabetes
cat("\n--- Prediabetes vs No diabetes ---\n")
## 
## --- Prediabetes vs No diabetes ---
perm_bmi_2 <- perm_test_two_groups(df, BMI, Diabetes_012, 
                                    "Prediabetes", "No diabetes", R = 10000)
cat("Chênh lệch trung bình quan sát:", round(perm_bmi_2$obs_diff, 2), "\n")
## Chênh lệch trung bình quan sát: 2.98
cat("P-value:", perm_bmi_2$p_value, "\n")
## P-value: 0
# So sánh Diabetes vs Prediabetes
cat("\n--- Diabetes vs Prediabetes ---\n")
## 
## --- Diabetes vs Prediabetes ---
perm_bmi_3 <- perm_test_two_groups(df, BMI, Diabetes_012, 
                                    "Diabetes", "Prediabetes", R = 10000)
cat("Chênh lệch trung bình quan sát:", round(perm_bmi_3$obs_diff, 2), "\n")
## Chênh lệch trung bình quan sát: 1.22
cat("P-value:", perm_bmi_3$p_value, "\n")
## P-value: 0
# Vẽ histogram phân phối permutation
ggplot(data = data.frame(diff = perm_bmi_1$perm_diffs), aes(x = diff)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "gray80", color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = perm_bmi_1$obs_diff, color = "blue", 
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +

    title = "Phân phối permutation: BMI (Diabetes - No diabetes)",
    x = "Chênh lệch trung bình",
    y = "Tần số"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

ggplot(data = data.frame(diff = perm_bmi_2$perm_diffs), aes(x = diff)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "gray80", color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = perm_bmi_2$obs_diff, color = "blue", 
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Phân phối permutation: BMI (Prediabetes - No diabetes)",
    x = "Chênh lệch trung bình",
    y = "Tần số"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

#  Bootstrap Test cho sự khác biệt BMI
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Viết hàm bootstrap test 

bootstrap_test_two_groups <- function(.data, var, group, group1, group2, R = 5000) {
  # Lọc dữ liệu cho 2 nhóm
  data_group1 <- .data %>%
    filter({{group}} == group1) %>%
    pull({{var}}) %>%
    .[is.finite(.)]
  
  data_group2 <- .data %>%
    filter({{group}} == group2) %>%
    pull({{var}}) %>%
    .[is.finite(.)]
  
  # Bước 1: Tính ước lượng từ dữ liệu gốc
  mean_1 <- mean(data_group1)
  mean_2 <- mean(data_group2)
  sd_1 <- sd(data_group1)
  sd_2 <- sd(data_group2)
  n_1 <- length(data_group1)
  n_2 <- length(data_group2)
  
  # Thống kê quan sát
  t_obs <- (mean_1 - mean_2) / sqrt(sd_1^2/n_1 + sd_2^2/n_2)
  
  # Bước 2: Tạo dữ liệu centered (trừ đi trung bình)
  data_1_centered <- data_group1 - mean_1
  data_2_centered <- data_group2 - mean_2
  
  # Bước 3-6: Bootstrap
  set.seed(123)
  t_boot <- sapply(1:R, function(i) {
    # Lấy mẫu bootstrap (with replacement)
    boot_1 <- sample(data_1_centered, n_1, replace = TRUE)
    boot_2 <- sample(data_2_centered, n_2, replace = TRUE)
    
    # Tính thống kê
    mean_boot_1 <- mean(boot_1)
    mean_boot_2 <- mean(boot_2)
    sd_boot_1 <- sd(boot_1)
    sd_boot_2 <- sd(boot_2)
    
    t_star <- (mean_boot_1 - mean_boot_2) / 
      sqrt(sd_boot_1^2/n_1 + sd_boot_2^2/n_2)
    
    return(t_star)
  })
  
  # Bước 7: Tính p-value (hai phía)
  p_val <- mean(abs(t_boot) >= abs(t_obs))
  
  return(list(
    t_obs = t_obs,
    t_boot = t_boot,
    p_value = p_val,
    mean_diff = mean_1 - mean_2,
    group1 = group1,
    group2 = group2
  ))
}

# Áp dụng bootstrap test
cat("\n=== BOOTSTRAP TEST: BMI ===\n")
## 
## === BOOTSTRAP TEST: BMI ===
cat("\n--- Diabetes vs No diabetes ---\n")
## 
## --- Diabetes vs No diabetes ---
boot_bmi_1 <- bootstrap_test_two_groups(df, BMI, Diabetes_012, 
                                        "Diabetes", "No diabetes", R = 5000)
cat("Thống kê t quan sát:", round(boot_bmi_1$t_obs, 2), "\n")
## Thống kê t quan sát: 101.38
cat("Chênh lệch trung bình:", round(boot_bmi_1$mean_diff, 2), "\n")
## Chênh lệch trung bình: 4.2
cat("P-value:", boot_bmi_1$p_value, "\n")
## P-value: 0
cat("\n--- Prediabetes vs No diabetes ---\n")
## 
## --- Prediabetes vs No diabetes ---
boot_bmi_2 <- bootstrap_test_two_groups(df, BMI, Diabetes_012, 
                                        "Prediabetes", "No diabetes", R = 5000)
cat("Thống kê t quan sát:", round(boot_bmi_2$t_obs, 2), "\n")
## Thống kê t quan sát: 28.88
cat("Chênh lệch trung bình:", round(boot_bmi_2$mean_diff, 2), "\n")
## Chênh lệch trung bình: 2.98
cat("P-value:", boot_bmi_2$p_value, "\n")
## P-value: 0
# Vẽ histogram phân phối bootstrap
ggplot(data = data.frame(t = boot_bmi_1$t_boot), aes(x = t)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "gray80", color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = boot_bmi_1$t_obs, color = "red", 
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Phân phối bootstrap: thống kê t cho BMI (Diabetes vs No diabetes)",
    x = "Thống kê t",
    y = "Tần số"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

#  Bootstrap CI cho BMI theo nhóm
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n=== BOOTSTRAP CONFIDENCE INTERVALS CHO BMI ===\n")
## 
## === BOOTSTRAP CONFIDENCE INTERVALS CHO BMI ===
# Hàm statistic cho boot()
boot_mean <- function(data, indices) {
  mean(data[indices])
}

# Lọc dữ liệu theo nhóm
bmi_no   <- df$BMI[df$Diabetes_012 == "No diabetes"]
bmi_pre  <- df$BMI[df$Diabetes_012 == "Prediabetes"]
bmi_diab <- df$BMI[df$Diabetes_012 == "Diabetes"]

# Loại bỏ giá trị không hợp lệ
bmi_no   <- bmi_no[is.finite(bmi_no)]
bmi_pre  <- bmi_pre[is.finite(bmi_pre)]
bmi_diab <- bmi_diab[is.finite(bmi_diab)]

# Bootstrap
set.seed(123)
boot_no   <- boot(bmi_no,   statistic = boot_mean, R = 5000)
boot_pre  <- boot(bmi_pre,  statistic = boot_mean, R = 5000)
boot_diab <- boot(bmi_diab, statistic = boot_mean, R = 5000)

# CI kiểu percentile
cat("\n--- No diabetes ---\n")
## 
## --- No diabetes ---
cat("Mean BMI:", round(mean(bmi_no), 2), "\n")
## Mean BMI: 27.74
ci_no <- boot.ci(boot_no, type = "perc")
print(ci_no)
## BOOTSTRAP CONFIDENCE INTERVAL CALCULATIONS
## Based on 5000 bootstrap replicates
## 
## CALL : 
## boot.ci(boot.out = boot_no, type = "perc")
## 
## Intervals : 
## Level     Percentile     
## 95%   (27.72, 27.77 )  
## Calculations and Intervals on Original Scale
cat("\n--- Prediabetes ---\n")
## 
## --- Prediabetes ---
cat("Mean BMI:", round(mean(bmi_pre), 2), "\n")
## Mean BMI: 30.72
ci_pre <- boot.ci(boot_pre, type = "perc")
print(ci_pre)
## BOOTSTRAP CONFIDENCE INTERVAL CALCULATIONS
## Based on 5000 bootstrap replicates
## 
## CALL : 
## boot.ci(boot.out = boot_pre, type = "perc")
## 
## Intervals : 
## Level     Percentile     
## 95%   (30.53, 30.93 )  
## Calculations and Intervals on Original Scale
cat("\n--- Diabetes ---\n")
## 
## --- Diabetes ---
cat("Mean BMI:", round(mean(bmi_diab), 2), "\n")
## Mean BMI: 31.94
ci_diab <- boot.ci(boot_diab, type = "perc")
print(ci_diab)
## BOOTSTRAP CONFIDENCE INTERVAL CALCULATIONS
## Based on 5000 bootstrap replicates
## 
## CALL : 
## boot.ci(boot.out = boot_diab, type = "perc")
## 
## Intervals : 
## Level     Percentile     
## 95%   (31.87, 32.02 )  
## Calculations and Intervals on Original Scale
# Vẽ phân phối bootstrap cho từng nhóm
df_boot_all <- data.frame(
  BMI = c(boot_no$t, boot_pre$t, boot_diab$t),
  Group = rep(c("No diabetes", "Prediabetes", "Diabetes"), 
              each = length(boot_no$t))
)

ggplot(df_boot_all, aes(x = BMI, fill = Group)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mean(bmi_no), color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mean(bmi_pre), color = "green", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mean(bmi_diab), color = "blue", linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Phân phối Bootstrap của trung bình BMI theo nhóm",
    x = "BMI trung bình",
    y = "Mật độ"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

# Phân tích tỷ lệ HighBP theo nhóm Diabetes
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n=== PHÂN TÍCH TỶ LỆ HIGH BLOOD PRESSURE ===\n")
## 
## === PHÂN TÍCH TỶ LỆ HIGH BLOOD PRESSURE ===
# Tính tỷ lệ HighBP theo nhóm
prop_highbp <- df %>%
  group_by(Diabetes_012) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    n_highbp = sum(HighBP == "Yes"),
    prop_highbp = mean(HighBP == "Yes"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
print(prop_highbp)
## # A tibble: 3 × 4
##   Diabetes_012      n n_highbp prop_highbp
##   <fct>         <int>    <int>       <dbl>
## 1 No diabetes  213703    79312       0.371
## 2 Prediabetes    4631     2913       0.629
## 3 Diabetes      35346    26604       0.753
# Permutation test cho tỷ lệ HighBP
perm_test_proportion <- function(.data, var, group, group1, group2, R = 10000) {
  # Lọc dữ liệu
  data_filtered <- .data %>%
    filter({{group}} %in% c(group1, group2)) %>%
    select({{var}}, {{group}})
  
  # Tính tỷ lệ quan sát
  prop_1 <- data_filtered %>%
    filter({{group}} == group1) %>%
    pull({{var}}) %>%
    {mean(. == "Yes")}
  
  prop_2 <- data_filtered %>%
    filter({{group}} == group2) %>%
    pull({{var}}) %>%
    {mean(. == "Yes")}
  
  obs_diff <- prop_1 - prop_2
  
  # Permutation
  values <- pull(data_filtered, {{var}})
  groups <- pull(data_filtered, {{group}})
  n <- length(values)
  n_group1 <- sum(groups == group1)
  
  set.seed(42)
  perm_diffs <- sapply(1:R, function(i) {
    idx_1 <- sample(1:n, size = n_group1, replace = FALSE)
    idx_2 <- setdiff(1:n, idx_1)
    prop_perm_1 <- mean(values[idx_1] == "Yes")
    prop_perm_2 <- mean(values[idx_2] == "Yes")
    return(prop_perm_1 - prop_perm_2)
  })
  
  p_val <- mean(abs(perm_diffs) >= abs(obs_diff))
  
  return(list(
    obs_diff = obs_diff,
    perm_diffs = perm_diffs,
    p_value = p_val
  ))
}

cat("\n--- Permutation test: HighBP (Diabetes vs No diabetes) ---\n")
## 
## --- Permutation test: HighBP (Diabetes vs No diabetes) ---
perm_highbp <- perm_test_proportion(df, HighBP, Diabetes_012, 
                                    "Diabetes", "No diabetes", R = 10000)
cat("Chênh lệch tỷ lệ quan sát:", round(perm_highbp$obs_diff, 4), "\n")
## Chênh lệch tỷ lệ quan sát: 0.3815
cat("P-value:", perm_highbp$p_value, "\n")
## P-value: 0
# Vẽ histogram
ggplot(data = data.frame(diff = perm_highbp$perm_diffs), aes(x = diff)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "gray80", color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = perm_highbp$obs_diff, color = "blue", 
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Phân phối permutation: Tỷ lệ HighBP (Diabetes - No diabetes)",
    x = "Chênh lệch tỷ lệ",
    y = "Tần số"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

#  Bootstrap CI cho tỷ lệ HighBP
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n=== BOOTSTRAP CI CHO TỶ LỆ HIGH BP ===\n")
## 
## === BOOTSTRAP CI CHO TỶ LỆ HIGH BP ===
# Hàm statistic cho tỷ lệ
boot_proportion <- function(data, indices) {
  mean(data[indices] == "Yes")
}

# Lọc dữ liệu HighBP theo nhóm
highbp_no   <- df$HighBP[df$Diabetes_012 == "No diabetes"]
highbp_pre  <- df$HighBP[df$Diabetes_012 == "Prediabetes"]
highbp_diab <- df$HighBP[df$Diabetes_012 == "Diabetes"]

# Bootstrap
set.seed(456)
boot_highbp_no   <- boot(highbp_no,   statistic = boot_proportion, R = 5000)
boot_highbp_pre  <- boot(highbp_pre,  statistic = boot_proportion, R = 5000)
boot_highbp_diab <- boot(highbp_diab, statistic = boot_proportion, R = 5000)

# CI kiểu percentile
cat("\n--- No diabetes ---\n")
## 
## --- No diabetes ---
cat("Tỷ lệ HighBP:", round(mean(highbp_no == "Yes"), 4), "\n")
## Tỷ lệ HighBP: 0.3711
ci_highbp_no <- boot.ci(boot_highbp_no, type = "perc")
print(ci_highbp_no)
## BOOTSTRAP CONFIDENCE INTERVAL CALCULATIONS
## Based on 5000 bootstrap replicates
## 
## CALL : 
## boot.ci(boot.out = boot_highbp_no, type = "perc")
## 
## Intervals : 
## Level     Percentile     
## 95%   ( 0.3691,  0.3731 )  
## Calculations and Intervals on Original Scale
cat("\n--- Prediabetes ---\n")
## 
## --- Prediabetes ---
cat("Tỷ lệ HighBP:", round(mean(highbp_pre == "Yes"), 4), "\n")
## Tỷ lệ HighBP: 0.629
ci_highbp_pre <- boot.ci(boot_highbp_pre, type = "perc")
print(ci_highbp_pre)
## BOOTSTRAP CONFIDENCE INTERVAL CALCULATIONS
## Based on 5000 bootstrap replicates
## 
## CALL : 
## boot.ci(boot.out = boot_highbp_pre, type = "perc")
## 
## Intervals : 
## Level     Percentile     
## 95%   ( 0.6148,  0.6422 )  
## Calculations and Intervals on Original Scale
cat("\n--- Diabetes ---\n")
## 
## --- Diabetes ---
cat("Tỷ lệ HighBP:", round(mean(highbp_diab == "Yes"), 4), "\n")
## Tỷ lệ HighBP: 0.7527
ci_highbp_diab <- boot.ci(boot_highbp_diab, type = "perc")
print(ci_highbp_diab)
## BOOTSTRAP CONFIDENCE INTERVAL CALCULATIONS
## Based on 5000 bootstrap replicates
## 
## CALL : 
## boot.ci(boot.out = boot_highbp_diab, type = "perc")
## 
## Intervals : 
## Level     Percentile     
## 95%   ( 0.7482,  0.7572 )  
## Calculations and Intervals on Original Scale
# Vẽ phân phối bootstrap
ggplot(data = data.frame(prop = boot_highbp_diab$t), aes(x = prop)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mean(highbp_diab == "Yes"), color = "red", 
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = ci_highbp_diab$percent[4], color = "blue", 
             linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = ci_highbp_diab$percent[5], color = "blue", 
             linetype = "dotted") +
  labs(
    title = "Phân phối Bootstrap: Tỷ lệ HighBP (nhóm Diabetes)",
    x = "Tỷ lệ",
    y = "Tần số"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

# Phân tích tỷ lệ HighChol theo nhóm Diabetes

  group_by(Diabetes_012) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    n_highchol = sum(HighChol == "Yes"),
    prop_highchol = mean(HighChol == "Yes"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
print(prop_highchol)

## 2 Prediabetes    4631       2875         0.621
## 3 Diabetes      35346      23686         0.670
cat("\n--- Permutation test: HighChol (Diabetes vs No diabetes) ---\n")

## --- Permutation test: HighChol (Diabetes vs No diabetes) ---
perm_highchol <- perm_test_proportion(df, HighChol, Diabetes_012, 
                                      "Diabetes", "No diabetes", R = 10000)
cat("Chênh lệch tỷ lệ quan sát:", round(perm_highchol$obs_diff, 4), "\n")
## Chênh lệch tỷ lệ quan sát: 0.2909
cat("P-value:", perm_highchol$p_value, "\n")
## P-value: 0
# Bootstrap CI cho HighChol
highchol_diab <- df$HighChol[df$Diabetes_012 == "Diabetes"]
set.seed(789)
boot_highchol_diab <- boot(highchol_diab, statistic = boot_proportion, R = 5000)

cat("\n--- Bootstrap CI cho HighChol (nhóm Diabetes) ---\n")
## 
## --- Bootstrap CI cho HighChol (nhóm Diabetes) ---
cat("Tỷ lệ HighChol:", round(mean(highchol_diab == "Yes"), 4), "\n")
## Tỷ lệ HighChol: 0.6701
ci_highchol_diab <- boot.ci(boot_highchol_diab, type = "perc")
print(ci_highchol_diab)
## BOOTSTRAP CONFIDENCE INTERVAL CALCULATIONS
## Based on 5000 bootstrap replicates
## 
## CALL : 
## boot.ci(boot.out = boot_highchol_diab, type = "perc")
## 
## Intervals : 
## Level     Percentile

## Calculations and Intervals on Original Scale

# -------------------------------------------------------------------

## === PHÂN TÍCH SMOKING STATUS ===
prop_smoker <- df %>%
  group_by(Diabetes_012) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    n_smoker = sum(Smoker == "Yes"),
    prop_smoker = mean(Smoker == "Yes"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
print(prop_smoker)

##   Diabetes_012      n n_smoker prop_smoker
##   <fct>         <int>    <int>       <dbl>
## 1 No diabetes  213703    91824       0.430
## 2 Prediabetes    4631     2282       0.493
## 3 Diabetes      35346    18317       0.518
# Permutation test
cat("\n--- Permutation test: Smoker (Diabetes vs No diabetes) ---\n")
## 
## --- Permutation test: Smoker (Diabetes vs No diabetes) ---
perm_smoker <- perm_test_proportion(df, Smoker, Diabetes_012, 
                                    "Diabetes", "No diabetes", R = 10000)
cat("Chênh lệch tỷ lệ quan sát:", round(perm_smoker$obs_diff, 4), "\n")
## Chênh lệch tỷ lệ quan sát: 0.0885
cat("P-value:", perm_smoker$p_value, "\n")
## P-value: 0
# Bootstrap CI
smoker_diab <- df$Smoker[df$Diabetes_012 == "Diabetes"]
set.seed(999)
boot_smoker_diab <- boot(smoker_diab, statistic = boot_proportion, R = 5000)

cat("\n--- Bootstrap CI cho Smoker (nhóm Diabetes) ---\n")
## 
## --- Bootstrap CI cho Smoker (nhóm Diabetes) ---
cat("Tỷ lệ Smoker:", round(mean(smoker_diab == "Yes"), 4), "\n")
## Tỷ lệ Smoker: 0.5182
ci_smoker_diab <- boot.ci(boot_smoker_diab, type = "perc")
print(ci_smoker_diab)
## BOOTSTRAP CONFIDENCE INTERVAL CALCULATIONS
## Based on 5000 bootstrap replicates
## 
## CALL : 
## boot.ci(boot.out = boot_smoker_diab, type = "perc")
## 
## Intervals : 
## Level     Percentile     
## 95%   ( 0.5130,  0.5235 )  
## Calculations and Intervals on Original Scale
# Tạo bảng tổng hợp thống kê theo nhóm
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n=== BẢNG THỐNG KÊ TỔNG HỢP THEO NHÓM DIABETES ===\n")
## 
## === BẢNG THỐNG KÊ TỔNG HỢP THEO NHÓM DIABETES ===
summary_stats <- df %>%
  group_by(Diabetes_012) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_BMI = mean(BMI, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_BMI = sd(BMI, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_BMI = median(BMI, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_BMI = min(BMI, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_BMI = max(BMI, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_HighBP = mean(HighBP == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_HighChol = mean(HighChol == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_Smoker = mean(Smoker == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print.data.frame(summary_stats, digits = 4)
##   Diabetes_012      n mean_BMI sd_BMI median_BMI min_BMI max_BMI prop_HighBP
## 1  No diabetes 213703    27.74  6.261         27      12      98      0.3711
## 2  Prediabetes   4631    30.72  6.965         30      13      96      0.6290
## 3     Diabetes  35346    31.94  7.363         31      13      98      0.7527
##   prop_HighChol prop_Smoker
## 1        0.3792      0.4297
## 2        0.6208      0.4928
## 3        0.6701      0.5182
#  Phân tích theo nhóm tuổi
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n=== PHÂN TÍCH THEO NHÓM TUỔI ===\n")
## 
## === PHÂN TÍCH THEO NHÓM TUỔI ===
age_diabetes_stats <- df %>%
  group_by(AgeGroup, Diabetes_012) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(AgeGroup) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  filter(Diabetes_012 == "Diabetes")

print(age_diabetes_stats)
## # A tibble: 13 × 4
## # Groups:   AgeGroup [13]
##    AgeGroup Diabetes_012     n   prop
##    <ord>    <fct>        <int>  <dbl>
##  1 18–24    Diabetes        78 0.0137
##  2 25–29    Diabetes       140 0.0184
##  3 30–34    Diabetes       314 0.0282
##  4 35–39    Diabetes       626 0.0453
##  5 40–44    Diabetes      1051 0.0650
##  6 45–49    Diabetes      1742 0.0879
##  7 50–54    Diabetes      3088 0.117 
##  8 55–59    Diabetes      4263 0.138 
##  9 60–64    Diabetes      5733 0.172 
## 10 65–69    Diabetes      6558 0.204 
## 11 70–74    Diabetes      5141 0.218 
## 12 75–79    Diabetes      3403 0.213 
## 13 80+      Diabetes      3209 0.185
# Vẽ biểu đồ tỷ lệ Diabetes theo nhóm tuổi
ggplot(age_diabetes_stats, aes(x = AgeGroup, y = prop)) +
  geom_col(fill = "coral") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", prop*100)), 
            vjust = -0.5, size = 3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, limits = c(0, 0.5)) +
  labs(
    title = "Tỷ lệ Diabetes theo nhóm tuổi",
    x = "Nhóm tuổi",
    y = "Tỷ lệ"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

# ===================================================================
# PHẦN 4: NHẬN XÉT THỐNG KÊ
# ===================================================================

cat("\n")
cat("===============================================================\n")
## ===============================================================
cat("                    NHẬN XÉT THỐNG KÊ                          \n")
##                     NHẬN XÉT THỐNG KÊ
cat("===============================================================\n\n")
## ===============================================================
cat("1. PHÂN PHỐI DỮ LIỆU:\n")
## 1. PHÂN PHỐI DỮ LIỆU:
cat("   - Tổng số quan sát:", nrow(df), "\n")
##    - Tổng số quan sát: 253680
cat("   - Phân phối trạng thái Diabetes:\n")
##    - Phân phối trạng thái Diabetes:
diabetes_dist <- df %>% count(Diabetes_012) %>% mutate(prop = n/sum(n))
for(i in 1:nrow(diabetes_dist)) {
  cat("     +", diabetes_dist$Diabetes_012[i], ":", 
      diabetes_dist$n[i], "quan sát (", 
      round(diabetes_dist$prop[i]*100, 1), "%)\n")
}
##      + 1 : 213703 quan sát ( 84.2 %)
##      + 2 : 4631 quan sát ( 1.8 %)
##      + 3 : 35346 quan sát ( 13.9 %)
cat("\n")
cat("2. BMI VÀ DIABETES:\n")
## 2. BMI VÀ DIABETES:
cat("   a) So sánh Diabetes vs No diabetes:\n")
##    a) So sánh Diabetes vs No diabetes:
cat("      - Permutation test:\n")
##       - Permutation test:
cat("        + Chênh lệch trung bình BMI:", round(perm_bmi_1$obs_diff, 2), "\n")
##         + Chênh lệch trung bình BMI: 4.2
cat("        + P-value:", perm_bmi_1$p_value, "\n")
##         + P-value: 0
cat("      - Bootstrap test:\n")
##       - Bootstrap test:
cat("        + Thống kê t:", round(boot_bmi_1$t_obs, 2), "\n")
##         + Thống kê t: 101.38
cat("        + P-value:", boot_bmi_1$p_value, "\n")
##         + P-value: 0
cat("      - Bootstrap CI cho BMI:\n")
##       - Bootstrap CI cho BMI:
cat("        + No diabetes: [", round(ci_no$percent[4], 2), ", ", 
    round(ci_no$percent[5], 2), "]\n")
##         + No diabetes: [ 27.72 ,  27.77 ]
cat("        + Diabetes: [", round(ci_diab$percent[4], 2), ", ", 
    round(ci_diab$percent[5], 2), "]\n")
##         + Diabetes: [ 31.87 ,  32.02 ]
if(perm_bmi_1$p_value < 0.05) {
  cat("      => Kết luận: Có sự khác biệt có ý nghĩa thống kê (α = 0.05)\n")
} else {
  cat("      => Kết luận: Không có sự khác biệt có ý nghĩa thống kê (α = 0.05)\n")
}
##       => Kết luận: Có sự khác biệt có ý nghĩa thống kê (α = 0.05)
cat("\n")
cat("   b) So sánh Prediabetes vs No diabetes:\n")
##    b) So sánh Prediabetes vs No diabetes:
cat("      - Permutation test:\n")
##       - Permutation test:
cat("        + Chênh lệch trung bình BMI:", round(perm_bmi_2$obs_diff, 2), "\n")
##         + Chênh lệch trung bình BMI: 2.98
cat("        + P-value:", perm_bmi_2$p_value, "\n")
##         + P-value: 0
cat("      - Bootstrap test:\n")
##       - Bootstrap test:
cat("        + Thống kê t:", round(boot_bmi_2$t_obs, 2), "\n")
##         + Thống kê t: 28.88
cat("        + P-value:", boot_bmi_2$p_value, "\n")
##         + P-value: 0
cat("      - Bootstrap CI cho BMI:\n")
##       - Bootstrap CI cho BMI:
cat("        + Prediabetes: [", round(ci_pre$percent[4], 2), ", ", 
    round(ci_pre$percent[5], 2), "]\n")
##         + Prediabetes: [ 30.53 ,  30.93 ]
if(perm_bmi_2$p_value < 0.05) {
  cat("      => Kết luận: Có sự khác biệt có ý nghĩa thống kê (α = 0.05)\n")
} else {
  cat("      => Kết luận: Không có sự khác biệt có ý nghĩa thống kê (α = 0.05)\n")
}
##       => Kết luận: Có sự khác biệt có ý nghĩa thống kê (α = 0.05)
cat("\n")
cat("3. HUYẾT ÁP CAO (HighBP) VÀ DIABETES:\n")
## 3. HUYẾT ÁP CAO (HighBP) VÀ DIABETES:
cat("   - Tỷ lệ HighBP theo nhóm:\n")
##    - Tỷ lệ HighBP theo nhóm:
for(i in 1:nrow(prop_highbp)) {
  cat("     +", prop_highbp$Diabetes_012[i], ":", 
      round(prop_highbp$prop_highbp[i]*100, 1), "%\n")
}
##      + 1 : 37.1 %
##      + 2 : 62.9 %
##      + 3 : 75.3 %
cat("   - Permutation test (Diabetes vs No diabetes):\n")
##    - Permutation test (Diabetes vs No diabetes):
cat("     + Chênh lệch tỷ lệ:", round(perm_highbp$obs_diff, 4), "\n")
##      + Chênh lệch tỷ lệ: 0.3815
cat("     + P-value:", perm_highbp$p_value, "\n")
##      + P-value: 0
if(perm_highbp$p_value < 0.05) {
  cat("   => Kết luận: Tỷ lệ HighBP trong nhóm Diabetes khác biệt\n")
  cat("      có ý nghĩa thống kê so với nhóm No diabetes\n")
}
##    => Kết luận: Tỷ lệ HighBP trong nhóm Diabetes khác biệt
##       có ý nghĩa thống kê so với nhóm No diabetes
cat("   - Bootstrap CI cho tỷ lệ HighBP:\n")
##    - Bootstrap CI cho tỷ lệ HighBP:
cat("     + No diabetes: [", round(ci_highbp_no$percent[4]*100, 1), "%, ",
    round(ci_highbp_no$percent[5]*100, 1), "%]\n")
##      + No diabetes: [ 36.9 %,  37.3 %]
cat("     + Prediabetes: [", round(ci_highbp_pre$percent[4]*100, 1), "%, ",
    round(ci_highbp_pre$percent[5]*100, 1), "%]\n")
##      + Prediabetes: [ 61.5 %,  64.2 %]
cat("     + Diabetes: [", round(ci_highbp_diab$percent[4]*100, 1), "%, ",
    round(ci_highbp_diab$percent[5]*100, 1), "%]\n")
##      + Diabetes: [ 74.8 %,  75.7 %]
cat("\n")
cat("4. CHOLESTEROL CAO (HighChol) VÀ DIABETES:\n")
## 4. CHOLESTEROL CAO (HighChol) VÀ DIABETES:
cat("   - Tỷ lệ HighChol theo nhóm:\n")
##    - Tỷ lệ HighChol theo nhóm:
for(i in 1:nrow(prop_highchol)) {
  cat("     +", prop_highchol$Diabetes_012[i], ":", 
      round(prop_highchol$prop_highchol[i]*100, 1), "%\n")
}
##      + 1 : 37.9 %
##      + 2 : 62.1 %
##      + 3 : 67 %
cat("   - Permutation test (Diabetes vs No diabetes):\n")
##    - Permutation test (Diabetes vs No diabetes):
cat("     + Chênh lệch tỷ lệ:", round(perm_highchol$obs_diff, 4), "\n")
##      + Chênh lệch tỷ lệ: 0.2909
cat("     + P-value:", perm_highchol$p_value, "\n")
##      + P-value: 0
if(perm_highchol$p_value < 0.05) {
  cat("   => Kết luận: Tỷ lệ HighChol trong nhóm Diabetes khác biệt\n")
  cat("      có ý nghĩa thống kê so với nhóm No diabetes\n")
}
##    => Kết luận: Tỷ lệ HighChol trong nhóm Diabetes khác biệt
##       có ý nghĩa thống kê so với nhóm No diabetes
cat("   - Bootstrap CI cho nhóm Diabetes:\n")
##    - Bootstrap CI cho nhóm Diabetes:
cat("     + Tỷ lệ: [", round(ci_highchol_diab$percent[4]*100, 1), "%, ",
    round(ci_highchol_diab$percent[5]*100, 1), "%]\n")
##      + Tỷ lệ: [ 66.5 %,  67.5 %]
cat("\n")
cat("5. HÚT THUỐC (Smoker) VÀ DIABETES:\n")
## 5. HÚT THUỐC (Smoker) VÀ DIABETES:
cat("   - Tỷ lệ Smoker theo nhóm:\n")
##    - Tỷ lệ Smoker theo nhóm:
for(i in 1:nrow(prop_smoker)) {
  cat("     +", prop_smoker$Diabetes_012[i], ":", 
      round(prop_smoker$prop_smoker[i]*100, 1), "%\n")
}
##      + 1 : 43 %
##      + 2 : 49.3 %
##      + 3 : 51.8 %
cat("   - Permutation test (Diabetes vs No diabetes):\n")
##    - Permutation test (Diabetes vs No diabetes):
cat("     + Chênh lệch tỷ lệ:", round(perm_smoker$obs_diff, 4), "\n")
##      + Chênh lệch tỷ lệ: 0.0885
cat("     + P-value:", perm_smoker$p_value, "\n")
##      + P-value: 0
if(perm_smoker$p_value < 0.05) {
  cat("   => Kết luận: Có sự khác biệt có ý nghĩa thống kê\n")
} else {
  cat("   => Kết luận: Không có sự khác biệt có ý nghĩa thống kê\n")
}
##    => Kết luận: Có sự khác biệt có ý nghĩa thống kê
cat("   - Bootstrap CI cho nhóm Diabetes:\n")
##    - Bootstrap CI cho nhóm Diabetes:
cat("     + Tỷ lệ: [", round(ci_smoker_diab$percent[4]*100, 1), "%, ",
    round(ci_smoker_diab$percent[5]*100, 1), "%]\n")
##      + Tỷ lệ: [ 51.3 %,  52.4 %]
cat("\n")
cat("6. TUỔI VÀ DIABETES:\n")
## 6. TUỔI VÀ DIABETES:
cat("   - Tỷ lệ Diabetes tăng dần theo nhóm tuổi\n")
##    - Tỷ lệ Diabetes tăng dần theo nhóm tuổi
cat("   - Nhóm tuổi có tỷ lệ Diabetes cao nhất:\n")
##    - Nhóm tuổi có tỷ lệ Diabetes cao nhất:
max_age_group <- age_diabetes_stats %>% 
  filter(prop == max(prop))
cat("     +", as.character(max_age_group$AgeGroup), ":", 
    round(max_age_group$prop*100, 1), "%\n")
##      + 18–24 25–29 30–34 35–39 40–44 45–49 50–54 55–59 60–64 65–69 70–74 75–79 80+ : 1.4 1.8 2.8 4.5 6.5 8.8 11.7 13.8 17.2 20.4 21.8 21.3 18.5 %
cat("\n")
cat("7. KẾT LUẬN TỔNG QUÁT:\n")
## 7. KẾT LUẬN TỔNG QUÁT:
cat("   - Các yếu tố nguy cơ chính được xác định:\n")
##    - Các yếu tố nguy cơ chính được xác định:
cat("     + BMI cao: Nhóm Diabetes có BMI trung bình cao hơn đáng kể\n")
##      + BMI cao: Nhóm Diabetes có BMI trung bình cao hơn đáng kể
cat("     + Huyết áp cao: Tỷ lệ HighBP trong nhóm Diabetes cao hơn rõ rệt\n")
##      + Huyết áp cao: Tỷ lệ HighBP trong nhóm Diabetes cao hơn rõ rệt
cat("     + Cholesterol cao: Tỷ lệ HighChol trong nhóm Diabetes cao hơn\n")
##      + Cholesterol cao: Tỷ lệ HighChol trong nhóm Diabetes cao hơn
cat("     + Tuổi tác: Tỷ lệ Diabetes tăng theo độ tuổi\n")
##      + Tuổi tác: Tỷ lệ Diabetes tăng theo độ tuổi
cat("\n")
cat("   - Khuyến nghị:\n")
##    - Khuyến nghị:
cat("     + Kiểm soát BMI trong phạm vi khỏe mạnh\n")
##      + Kiểm soát BMI trong phạm vi khỏe mạnh
cat("     + Theo dõi và điều trị huyết áp cao\n")
##      + Theo dõi và điều trị huyết áp cao
cat("     + Kiểm tra cholesterol định kỳ\n")
##      + Kiểm tra cholesterol định kỳ
cat("     + Tầm soát Diabetes cho nhóm tuổi cao\n")
##      + Tầm soát Diabetes cho nhóm tuổi cao
cat("     + Can thiệp sớm đối với nhóm Prediabetes\n")
##      + Can thiệp sớm đối với nhóm Prediabetes
cat("\n")
cat("===============================================================\n")
## ===============================================================

PHẦN CỦA HOÀNG LONG Hồi quy và tiên đoán

GLM (Logistic)

df <- df %>%
  mutate(Diabetes_binary = case_when(
    Diabetes_012 == "Diabetes" ~ 1,
    TRUE ~ 0
  ))

df$Diabetes_binary <- as.factor(df$Diabetes_binary)

ggplot(df, aes(x = Diabetes_binary, fill = Diabetes_012)) +
  geom_bar(alpha = 0.7, position = "stack") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Diabetes Binary Outcome",
    x = "Diabetes (0 = No/Pre, 1 = Yes)",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

library(caret)
## Warning: package 'caret' was built under R version 4.4.3
## Loading required package: lattice
## 
## Attaching package: 'lattice'
## The following object is masked from 'package:boot':
## 
##     melanoma
## 
## Attaching package: 'caret'
## The following object is masked from 'package:survival':
## 
##     cluster
## The following object is masked from 'package:purrr':
## 
##     lift
train_index <- createDataPartition(df$Diabetes_binary, p = 0.7, list = FALSE)
train_data <- df[train_index, ]
test_data  <- df[-train_index, ]
library(dplyr)
library(magrittr)
## 
## Attaching package: 'magrittr'
## The following object is masked from 'package:purrr':
## 
##     set_names
## The following object is masked from 'package:tidyr':
## 
##     extract
library(caret)


train_data_balanced <- upSample(
  x = train_data %>% select(-Diabetes_binary),
  y = train_data$Diabetes_binary,
  yname = "Diabetes_binary"
)

ggplot(train_data_balanced, aes(x = Diabetes_binary)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(
    title = "Class distribution after upsampling",
    x = "Class",
    y = "Count"
  )

logistic_model <- glm(Diabetes_binary ~ Age + 
                   BMI +
                   HighBP + HighChol + Smoker +
                   PhysActivity + Sex + Income + GenHlth,
             data = train_data_balanced,
             family = binomial)
# Summarize the model
summary(logistic_model)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Diabetes_binary ~ Age + BMI + HighBP + HighChol + 
##     Smoker + PhysActivity + Sex + Income + GenHlth, family = binomial, 
##     data = train_data_balanced)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                Estimate Std. Error  z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)  -5.7267979  0.0372552 -153.718  < 2e-16 ***
## Age           0.1657354  0.0017518   94.611  < 2e-16 ***
## BMI           0.0739892  0.0007338  100.828  < 2e-16 ***
## HighBPYes     0.7688179  0.0093497   82.229  < 2e-16 ***
## HighCholYes   0.5756476  0.0089316   64.451  < 2e-16 ***
## SmokerYes    -0.0113857  0.0088532   -1.286    0.198    
## PhysActivity -0.0583755  0.0098725   -5.913 3.36e-09 ***
## Sex           0.3096555  0.0089465   34.612  < 2e-16 ***
## Income       -0.0682862  0.0022019  -31.012  < 2e-16 ***
## GenHlth       0.5706654  0.0047129  121.087  < 2e-16 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 423746  on 305667  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 319513  on 305658  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 319533
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 4
library(car)
## Warning: package 'car' was built under R version 4.4.3
## Loading required package: carData
## Warning: package 'carData' was built under R version 4.4.3
## 
## Attaching package: 'car'
## The following object is masked from 'package:boot':
## 
##     logit
## The following object is masked from 'package:purrr':
## 
##     some
## The following object is masked from 'package:dplyr':
## 
##     recode
vif(logistic_model)
##          Age          BMI       HighBP     HighChol       Smoker PhysActivity 
##     1.132722     1.091441     1.119024     1.053074     1.043300     1.072322 
##          Sex       Income      GenHlth 
##     1.062696     1.170334     1.174867
exp(coef(logistic_model))   # odds ratio
##  (Intercept)          Age          BMI    HighBPYes  HighCholYes    SmokerYes 
##  0.003257491  1.180260795  1.076795156  2.157214797  1.778281781  0.988678887 
## PhysActivity          Sex       Income      GenHlth 
##  0.943295674  1.362955430  0.933993082  1.769443998
# Xác suất dự đoán
prob_test <- predict(logistic_model, newdata = test_data, type = "response")

# Phân lớp với threshold 0.5
pred_class <- ifelse(prob_test > 0.5, 1, 0)
pred_class <- as.factor(pred_class)
confusionMatrix(pred_class, test_data$Diabetes_binary)
## Confusion Matrix and Statistics
## 
##           Reference
## Prediction     0     1
##          0 47190  2421
##          1 18310  8182
##                                           
##                Accuracy : 0.7276          
##                  95% CI : (0.7244, 0.7308)
##     No Information Rate : 0.8607          
##     P-Value [Acc > NIR] : 1               
##                                           
##                   Kappa : 0.3023          
##                                           
##  Mcnemar's Test P-Value : <2e-16          
##                                           
##             Sensitivity : 0.7205          
##             Specificity : 0.7717          
##          Pos Pred Value : 0.9512          
##          Neg Pred Value : 0.3088          
##              Prevalence : 0.8607          
##          Detection Rate : 0.6201          
##    Detection Prevalence : 0.6519          
##       Balanced Accuracy : 0.7461          
##                                           
##        'Positive' Class : 0               
## 
library(pROC)
## Warning: package 'pROC' was built under R version 4.4.3
## Type 'citation("pROC")' for a citation.
## 
## Attaching package: 'pROC'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     cov, smooth, var
roc_obj <- roc(test_data$Diabetes_binary, prob_test)
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
## Setting direction: controls < cases
auc(roc_obj)
## Area under the curve: 0.8215
plot(roc_obj, col = "blue", main = "ROC Curve - Logistic Model")

library(splines)
knots_age <- quantile(train_data_balanced$Age, probs = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75))

spline_model <- glm(Diabetes_binary ~ 
                      bs(Age, knots = knots_age, degree = 3) +
                      BMI + HighBP + HighChol,
                    data = train_data_balanced,
                    family = binomial)

summary(spline_model)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Diabetes_binary ~ bs(Age, knots = knots_age, degree = 3) + 
##     BMI + HighBP + HighChol, family = binomial, data = train_data_balanced)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                                           Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)
## (Intercept)                             -5.4067878  0.0583993 -92.583  < 2e-16
## bs(Age, knots = knots_age, degree = 3)1  0.4403312  0.0936674   4.701 2.59e-06
## bs(Age, knots = knots_age, degree = 3)2  1.6032876  0.0540450  29.666  < 2e-16
## bs(Age, knots = knots_age, degree = 3)3  1.9256603  0.0605168  31.820  < 2e-16
## bs(Age, knots = knots_age, degree = 3)4  2.4375100  0.0572138  42.603  < 2e-16
## bs(Age, knots = knots_age, degree = 3)5  2.2929430  0.0635082  36.105  < 2e-16
## bs(Age, knots = knots_age, degree = 3)6  2.3465068  0.0563883  41.613  < 2e-16
## BMI                                      0.0878839  0.0007101 123.758  < 2e-16
## HighBPYes                                0.9822820  0.0088870 110.530  < 2e-16
## HighCholYes                              0.6707574  0.0085563  78.394  < 2e-16
##                                            
## (Intercept)                             ***
## bs(Age, knots = knots_age, degree = 3)1 ***
## bs(Age, knots = knots_age, degree = 3)2 ***
## bs(Age, knots = knots_age, degree = 3)3 ***
## bs(Age, knots = knots_age, degree = 3)4 ***
## bs(Age, knots = knots_age, degree = 3)5 ***
## bs(Age, knots = knots_age, degree = 3)6 ***
## BMI                                     ***
## HighBPYes                               ***
## HighCholYes                             ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 423746  on 305667  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 341787  on 305658  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 341807
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 5
age_seq <- seq(min(train_data_balanced$Age), max(train_data_balanced$Age), length.out = 200)

newdata <- data.frame(
  Age = age_seq,
  BMI = mean(train_data_balanced$BMI, na.rm = TRUE),
  HighBP = "No",
  HighChol = "No"
)

newdata$pred <- predict(spline_model, newdata, type = "response")
ggplot(newdata, aes(x = Age, y = pred)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Spline (B-spline): Age → Risk of Diabetes",
    x = "Age group (1–13)",
    y = "Predicted probability"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.

Đánh giá mô hình:

# Predict
spline_prob <- predict(spline_model, newdata = test_data, type = "response")
spline_pred <- ifelse(spline_prob > 0.5, 1, 0)
spline_pred <- factor(spline_pred, levels = c(0,1))

# Confusion matrix + Accuracy
confusionMatrix(spline_pred, test_data$Diabetes_binary)
## Confusion Matrix and Statistics
## 
##           Reference
## Prediction     0     1
##          0 44853  2612
##          1 20647  7991
##                                           
##                Accuracy : 0.6944          
##                  95% CI : (0.6911, 0.6976)
##     No Information Rate : 0.8607          
##     P-Value [Acc > NIR] : 1               
##                                           
##                   Kappa : 0.256           
##                                           
##  Mcnemar's Test P-Value : <2e-16          
##                                           
##             Sensitivity : 0.6848          
##             Specificity : 0.7537          
##          Pos Pred Value : 0.9450          
##          Neg Pred Value : 0.2790          
##              Prevalence : 0.8607          
##          Detection Rate : 0.5894          
##    Detection Prevalence : 0.6237          
##       Balanced Accuracy : 0.7192          
##                                           
##        'Positive' Class : 0               
## 
# AUC
roc_spline <- roc(test_data$Diabetes_binary, spline_prob)
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
## Setting direction: controls < cases
auc(roc_spline)
## Area under the curve: 0.7879
plot(roc_spline,
     main = paste("ROC Curve - Spline Model (AUC =", round(auc(roc_spline), 3), ")"),
     col = "blue",
     lwd = 2)

# GAM

library(mgcv)
## Warning: package 'mgcv' was built under R version 4.4.3
## Loading required package: nlme
## 
## Attaching package: 'nlme'
## The following object is masked from 'package:dplyr':
## 
##     collapse
## This is mgcv 1.9-4. For overview type '?mgcv'.
gam_model <- gam(Diabetes_binary ~ 
                   s(Age) + 
                   s(BMI) +
                   HighBP + HighChol + Smoker +
                   PhysActivity + Sex + Income + GenHlth,
                 data = train_data_balanced,
                 family = binomial)

summary(gam_model)
## 
## Family: binomial 
## Link function: logit 
## 
## Formula:
## Diabetes_binary ~ s(Age) + s(BMI) + HighBP + HighChol + Smoker + 
##     PhysActivity + Sex + Income + GenHlth
## 
## Parametric coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)  -1.984825   0.023652 -83.916  < 2e-16 ***
## HighBPYes     0.721526   0.009427  76.537  < 2e-16 ***
## HighCholYes   0.537486   0.009034  59.493  < 2e-16 ***
## SmokerYes    -0.022275   0.008940  -2.491   0.0127 *  
## PhysActivity -0.053222   0.009947  -5.351 8.77e-08 ***
## Sex           0.289391   0.009081  31.869  < 2e-16 ***
## Income       -0.079608   0.002240 -35.544  < 2e-16 ***
## GenHlth       0.566457   0.004763 118.919  < 2e-16 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Approximate significance of smooth terms:
##          edf Ref.df Chi.sq p-value    
## s(Age) 8.385  8.864   9662  <2e-16 ***
## s(BMI) 7.893  8.510  12790  <2e-16 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## R-sq.(adj) =  0.312   Deviance explained = 25.5%
## UBRE = 0.032296  Scale est. = 1         n = 305668
terms_gam <- predict(gam_model, type = "terms")

head(terms_gam)
##      HighBP  HighChol      Smoker PhysActivity       Sex      Income  GenHlth
## 1 0.7215265 0.5374859 -0.02227473   0.00000000 0.0000000 -0.23882366 2.832284
## 2 0.0000000 0.0000000 -0.02227473  -0.05322229 0.0000000 -0.07960789 1.699370
## 3 0.7215265 0.5374859  0.00000000   0.00000000 0.0000000 -0.63686310 2.832284
## 4 0.7215265 0.0000000 -0.02227473   0.00000000 0.0000000 -0.55725521 1.699370
## 5 0.7215265 0.5374859 -0.02227473  -0.05322229 0.0000000 -0.31843155 1.699370
## 6 0.0000000 0.0000000  0.00000000   0.00000000 0.2893905 -0.23882366 1.132914
##        s(Age)     s(BMI)
## 1  0.14802672  0.8421719
## 2 -0.19158614 -0.4349584
## 3  0.14802672 -0.0927006
## 4  0.14802672  0.1266436
## 5  0.49764441 -0.4349584
## 6 -0.04932615 -0.5475299
library(mgcv)     
library(mgcViz)
## Warning: package 'mgcViz' was built under R version 4.4.3
## Loading required package: qgam
## Warning: package 'qgam' was built under R version 4.4.3
## Registered S3 method overwritten by 'mgcViz':
##   method from   
##   +.gg   ggplot2
## 
## Attaching package: 'mgcViz'
## The following object is masked from 'package:lattice':
## 
##     qq
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     qqline, qqnorm, qqplot
library(caret)
viz <- getViz(gam_model)

print(plot(viz, allTerms = T), pages = 1)

Đánh giá mô hình:

library(pROC)
# Predict probability on test set
gam_prob <- predict(gam_model, test_data, type = "response")

roc_gam <- roc(test_data$Diabetes_binary, gam_prob)
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
## Setting direction: controls < cases
auc(roc_gam)
## Area under the curve: 0.8261
plot(roc_gam, main = "ROC Curve - GAM")

# LASSO:

X <- model.matrix(
  Diabetes_binary ~ HighBP + HighChol + CholCheck + BMI + Smoker + Stroke +
    HeartDiseaseorAttack + PhysActivity + Sex + Age + Education + Income + GenHlth,
  data = train_data_balanced
)[, -1]  

y <- as.numeric(train_data_balanced$Diabetes_binary) - 1
library(glmnet)
## Warning: package 'glmnet' was built under R version 4.4.3
## Loading required package: Matrix
## 
## Attaching package: 'Matrix'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:tidyr':
## 
##     expand, pack, unpack
## Loaded glmnet 4.1-10
set.seed(123)
cv_lasso <- cv.glmnet(X, y, family = "binomial", alpha = 1)

plot(cv_lasso)

best_lambda_lasso <- cv_lasso$lambda.min
best_lambda_lasso
## [1] 0.0009135665
lasso_model <- glmnet(X, y, family = "binomial", alpha = 1, lambda = best_lambda_lasso)

coef(lasso_model)
## 14 x 1 sparse Matrix of class "dgCMatrix"
##                               s0
## (Intercept)          -6.60779050
## HighBPYes             0.73477755
## HighCholYes           0.54323409
## CholCheck             1.27821155
## BMI                   0.07269806
## SmokerYes            -0.00778086
## Stroke                0.15731000
## HeartDiseaseorAttack  0.25411969
## PhysActivity         -0.04815974
## Sex                   0.28217988
## Age                   0.15314001
## Education            -0.04092247
## Income               -0.05873609
## GenHlth               0.54223494

Đánh giá mô hình:

X_test <- model.matrix(
  Diabetes_binary ~ HighBP + HighChol + CholCheck + BMI + Smoker + Stroke +
    HeartDiseaseorAttack + PhysActivity + Sex + Age + Education + Income + GenHlth,
  data = test_data
)[, -1]

lasso_prob <- predict(lasso_model, newx = X_test, type = "response")
roc_lasso <- roc(test_data$Diabetes_binary, as.numeric(lasso_prob))
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
## Setting direction: controls < cases
auc(roc_lasso)
## Area under the curve: 0.8239
plot(roc_lasso, main = "ROC Curve - LASSO")
